name: reparole
description: ReParole Pro — rééducation de la parole post-AVC. Ce package.json ne sert qu'aux tests (l'app elle-même n'a aucune dépendance : voir README.md).

scripts.test: node tests/learner.test.js && node tests/i18n-completeness.test.js && node tests/pwa-check.test.js && node tests/plan-and-mfa.test.js && node tests/companion-explain.test.js && node tests/caregiver.test.js && node tests/patient-summary.test.js && node tests/knowledge-base.test.js && node tests/text-normalize.test.js && node tests/short-session.test.js && node tests/journal.test.js && node tests/caregiver-words.test.js && node tests/feedback-and-lang-refresh.test.js
